about.title: Tied by hand and heart
about.body: In our shop we choose each stem with care and tie every bouquet fresh on site. We believe in seasonal beauty, honest craft and arrangements as unique as the occasion.

featured.title: A few moments from our shop

a.quote: The bridal bouquet was stunning and exactly as I dreamed. Thank you!
a.name: Anna

b.quote: Beautiful arrangements and warm service. I keep coming back.
b.name: Minh

c.quote: Fresh flowers, tastefully tied. Highly recommended.
